title: No Escaping The Scourging.
content:
God scourgeth some severely, some He spares;
    But all in smart have less or greater shares.
meaning:
Robert Herrick's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "No Escaping The Scourging."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
